error.capacity_details: ndidinga ii-bits ze-%d, umthamo ophezulu kwi-k=1 yi-bits ze-%d
error.insufficient_capacity: umyalezo mkhulu kakhulu kumthamo we-coefficient okhoyo
error.insufficient_coefficients: ii-coefficients ezinganelanga ngexesha lokufaka: kufuneka %d, ndifumene %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: ii-coefficients ezinganeleyo zokusetyenziswa kwe-header embedding: kufuneka ii-bits ezingama-32, kufunyenwe kuphela ii-coefficients ezisebenzisekayo ze-%d
error.invalid_coefficient_range: ixabiso le-coefficient alikho kuluhlu olusebenzayo (-2048 ukuya ku-2047)
error.invalid_force_k: iForceK engasebenziyo: kufuneka ibe yi-0 (ngokuzenzekelayo) okanye i-1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: ipharamitha ka-k kufuneka ibe phakathi kuka-1 no-8
error.matrix_encode_failed: ikhowudi ye-matrix ayiphumelelanga kwikhowudi yegama elithi: %v
error.message_too_large: ubungakanani bomyalezo budlula ubuninzi obuvumelekileyo (iibhayithi eziyi-8,388,607)
error.nil_random_source: umthombo ongacwangciswanga awunakuba yi-nil: sebenzisa i-InitializePRNG(password) okanye unikezele nge-RandomSource esele ityalwe ngaphambili
